title: BEM-916 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM916_UNIFIED_SYSTEM_IMPROVEMENT_PROTOCOL_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-916 UNIFIED SYSTEM IMPROVEMENT PROTOCOL REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: correct BEM-915 mistake and prepare one unified updated system improvement protocol.
Correction:
- BEM-914 was the system improvement protocol after Claude audit.
- BEM-915 was incorrectly prepared as a separate Telegram protocol.
- Operator clarification: update the previous protocol and add Telegram improvement mechanism inside it.
Required unified protocol:
- Base protocol: BEM-914 system improvement protocol.
- Integrated Telegram layer: BEM-915 Telegram Operator Interface, as a dedicated section/phase inside the same protocol.
Must include all BEM-914 phases:
1. Proof hardening: CI/Git proof, release proof manifest, SHA/Actions evidence.
2. Dispatch lifecycle hardening: queue invariant, no stale queued records, consumer workflow_dispatch.
3. Object execution hardening: GD/DIR/WRK runners, prompts, optional operator-gated LLM runtime.
4. Channel and event log hardening: schema, consumer, event completeness, log rotation.
5. Architecture canon freshness: plan/fact/gap updates.
6. Re-audit package for Claude.
Must integrate Telegram as a new phase, not as separate protocol:
7. Telegram Operator Interface: task intake, commands, structured envelope, routing to Curator/Director/General Director/Worker, reports, receipts, correlation IDs, errors, E2E selftest.
Operator gates:
- bot token/secrets;
- production webhook changes;
- issue #31 writes;
- schedule triggers;
- always-on daemon;
- real pilot/client/scope/metrics;
- LLM-agent runtime model.
Worker must confirm:
- The integrated protocol is coherent and executable.
- BEM-915 is not standalone; it is incorporated into unified BEM-916.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
